title: LegacyRoulette
description: Now you can gamble safely with your pvp legacy friends!
body:
# 🧩 Legacy Roulette

**Legacy Roulette** lets you gamble to get random legacy lore players.
Every player has a rarity and corresponding chance. 
Do note, This does not contain any real world interaction, nor close to real life graphics.

## ✨ Features
- `/vlroulette` to open the screen
- Gamble for pvp legacy players
- View which players you've gotten.

### Credit to Awesomepvpcat for the idea
